name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum, minNum

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = FALSE
      /\ maxNum = 0
      /\ minNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' = FALSE THEN num ELSE num' + 1
      /\ flag' = IF flag = FALSE THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
      /\ maxNum' = IF flag' = FALSE THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
      /\ minNum' = IF flag' = FALSE THEN minNum ELSE minNum' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxNum, minNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K) \land Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
         /\ head \in 1..K
         /\ tail \in 1..K
         /\ count \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmitCount \in FiniteSet
